name: mcp-voice
description: local cross-platform MCP server that uses python sounddevice to record and play sound. Uses kokoro for text-to-speech and faster_whisper for speech-to-text. uses webrtcvad for detectinting when a user has stopped speaking.

tools.name: speak
tools.description: Convert text to speech and play it through the local speaker

tools.name: listen
tools.description: Record audio from the microphone and return a transcript

prompts.name: Listen (STT)
prompts.text: Listen to my microphone and transcribe what I say

pause_seconds.title: amount of silence to listen for before ending recording
pause_seconds.description: amount of silence to listen for before ending recording
